note: Vendor stock is refreshed by scraper.py via GitHub Actions. 'last_checked' shows when each auto-checked vendor was last verified. In-store vendors are marked manual — call ahead or check in person.

fruits.name: Mango
fruits.typical_season: March – July (Indian imports peak Apr – Jun)
fruits.source_regions: Maharashtra, Gujarat, Andhra Pradesh (India); Mexico/Florida for domestic

fruits.name: Jackfruit
fruits.source_regions: Mexico, SE Asia; green jackfruit canned year-round

fruits.name: Jamun
fruits.source_regions: India; mostly frozen in the US

fruits.name: Ber
fruits.source_regions: India; fresh Chinese jujube in US

fruits.name: Amla
fruits.source_regions: India; fresh, frozen, candied in US

fruits.name: Karonda
fruits.source_regions: India (rare fresh in US; often pickled)

fruits.name: Water Apple
fruits.source_regions: SE Asia, Florida (rare fresh in US)

vendors.name: Tropical Fruit Box
vendors.location: Ships nationwide with free shipping — Homewood, IL based
vendors.note: Single-fruit and build-your-own exotic boxes; carries rare Asian fruit when in season.
vendors.status_text: Carries multiple fruits — see each fruit's own status below.

Mango.unit_note: Size selector offers 10lb/14lb (product description separately claims 12lb — used the lower, more conservative figure)

Mangosteen.unit_note: Small box option (3lb); Regular (5lb, $29.80/lb) and Large (7lb, $21.29/lb) also both exceed $20/lb

Rambutan.unit_note: Small box option (3lb); Regular (5lb) and Large (8lb) would be under $20/lb but the default/scraped price matches the Small variant

Dragon Fruit.unit_note: Smallest box option available is 5lb (no 3lb size for this fruit)

Custard Apple.unit_note: Smallest box option available is 5lb (no 3lb size for this fruit)

vendors.name: Miami Fruit
